hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs centralize PEP and sanctions screening across providers into a structured workflow that preserves audit evidence and supports operational AML review.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: VASP compliance teams struggle with fragmented PEP and sanctions screening outputs spread across multiple providers. This separation creates slow review cycles, inconsistent risk assessment, and gaps in audit evidence needed for thorough AML compliance operations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates sanctions and PEP screening results from multiple providers into unified cases with linked evidence, risk context, decision logs and regulatory rule updates for streamlined AML compliance review.
workflow_title: From screening hits to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY processes PEP and sanctions screening results by applying rules, routing alerts, opening review cases, recording decisions and preserving audit evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond screening alerts. Provider-neutral compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented PEP screening outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence without replacing existing compliance providers.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs with structured provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and deployment control to support accountable PEP screening workflows for compliance teams.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected platform to structure PEP screening, sanctions checks, case workflows, evidence preservation and reporting within a controlled compliance operating layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage PEP screening workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates PEP screening results by consolidating provider outputs, applying internal rules, routing reviews, creating cases and tracking decisions across customer profiles and transaction activity.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve PEP screening evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by recording decision logs, case histories and supporting documentation for every PEP screening review to enable traceable compliance and defensible reporting.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing PEP screening providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from multiple PEP and sanctions screening providers into one workflow without disrupting current provider integrations or data sources.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace screening providers but turns their outputs into structured reviews, case management, regulatory rule updates and audit evidence.
final_title: Structure VASP PEP screening with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects sanctions and PEP outputs into controlled workflows with audit-ready evidence and case management.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
